demo_blocked_features.reason: Demo build caps cargo slots to 6kg; full build supports 30kg.
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: 6 kg cap, full build: 30 kg cap.

demo_blocked_features.reason: Demo seeds carry a single hazard; full build seeds carry up to three.
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: 1 hazard, full build: up to 3 hazards.

demo_blocked_features.reason: Demo wipes save state after 20 minutes of active play.
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: 20 min cap, full build: unlimited.

demo_blocked_features.reason: Demo does not persist cross-run world state (ADR-0012 deferred).
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: per-run only, full build: cross-run persistence.

demo_blocked_features.reason: Hub/meta progression is deferred through Gate 2 per ADR-0003.
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: skip hub, full build: skip hub (Gate 3).
